product.name: Vercel
product.description: A cloud platform for web development and deployment that provides developer tools and cloud infrastructure to build, deploy, scale, and secure web applications. Positioned as 'the AI Cloud' for building faster, more personalized web experiences.
product.audience: Developers, development teams, and businesses of multiple sizes (from individual developers to enterprises)

positioning.forWho: Developers, teams, and enterprises requiring deployment, scaling, and security capabilities

context.pricing: Freemium model with Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers
